scripts.infra:dev:up: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env.development up -d db redis api; else docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d db redis api; fi'
scripts.infra:dev:down: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env.development down; else docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down; fi'
scripts.infra:dev:logs: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env.development logs -f; else docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f; fi'
scripts.infra:dev:ps: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env.development ps; else docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml ps; fi'
scripts.infra:dev:config: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.development ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .env.development config; else docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml config; fi'
scripts.infra:prod:up: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.production ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production up -d; else docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d; fi'
scripts.infra:prod:down: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.production ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production down; else docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml down; fi'
scripts.infra:prod:logs: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.production ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production logs -f; else docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs -f; fi'
scripts.infra:prod:ps: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.production ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production ps; else docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml ps; fi'
scripts.infra:prod:config: sh -c 'if [ -f .env.production ]; then docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.production config; else docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml config; fi'
scripts.docker:build:all: pnpm docker:build:api && pnpm docker:build:web && pnpm docker:build:admin
scripts.docker:check:all: pnpm docker:check:api && pnpm docker:check:web && pnpm docker:check:admin
